description: Daisy, Sousa, and Mack are aboard their Quinjet, executing their unpredictable plan to rendezvous with Zephyr One. They experience awe at the view of space, banter nervously, and initiate a risky controlled burn toward the target. The scene is suspenseful, blending camaraderie and nerve-wracking action as they leave Earth behind.

transcript.line: Guys, my stomach feels... Whoa. Thank you.
Now that we're out of the atmosphere, we should be able to lock on to the Zephyr.
It's really something, huh? All right. Better strap in there, buddy. This next part's gonna be tricky.
Seriously, if this isn't timed out just right, we will freeze to death in the dark void of space. So, buckle up, Danny Boy. Okay. Triangulating burn path to Z1.
